summary: Alley Boss, a popular streamer and high-level player, is targeted by a rival group who hires a skilled mercenary named Clear to snipe him during a live broadcast. Clear initiates a high-stakes 'character deletion' bet, hoping to force Alley Boss to lose his account and items. However, Alley Boss easily defeats the assassin by mimicking his dual-sword technique and mocks his employer, ultimately walking away with a significant gold reward.
key_moments: A viewer warns Alley Boss about a planned sniper attack involving a mercenary named Clear.
Clear confronts Alley Boss during his livestream, forcing a 'winner-takes-all' character deletion bet.
Alley Boss effortlessly counters Clear's attacks using his own dual-wielding style and defeats him, revealing he knew who funded the hit.
